hooks.command: diff -q "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json" >/dev/null 2>&1 || (mkdir -p "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package-lock.json" . && npm ci --production --ignore-scripts 2>/dev/null && ln -sfn "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/node_modules" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/node_modules") || rm -f "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json"
